projectDescription: AI-powered bioinformatics platform that lets researchers run complex biological analyses using plain English, without writing code or managing pipelines.
keyFeatures: Natural language bioinformatics analysis — describe your research question in plain English
Autonomous multi-stage pipeline execution with self-healing code
207+ pre-built skills for tools like AlphaFold, Scanpy, AutoDock Vina, and more
Custom skill creation to capture lab-specific protocols and preferences
Native support for FASTQ, VCF, BAM, H5AD, CSV, and other standard formats
Publication-ready visualizations including volcano plots, heatmaps, and bar charts
Literature-grounded insights from PubMed, UniProt, and NCBI
Built-in reproducibility — every workflow preserves context, steps, and outputs
GDPR-compliant EU infrastructure with zero-retention AI and sandbox isolation
Bring-your-own LLM and on-premise deployment options
publicApiSurface: File upload (CSV, FASTQ, VCF, BAM, H5AD)
Skills catalogue (207 pre-built tool and workflow skills)
Visualization output (bar charts, volcano plots, heatmaps)
Enterprise SSO and multi-user shared workspaces
